introSection: Twisted Typhoon is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. This attraction was once known as Hangman from 1999 to 2011.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and blue supports, used to be orange track with mudgreen supports.

fullText:
Twisted Typhoon is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma. This attraction was once known as Hangman from 1999 to 2011.



Green track and blue supports, used to be orange track with mudgreen supports.
